summary: SSH-first VM hosting control plane for Plover.digital.
agentGuidance: If the human did not provide a Killdeer username, ask for it before constructing account-specific SSH commands.
Use killdeer.digital as the public hostname.
Do not invent HTTP VM-management API calls. The public control surface is the SSH command line.
Use ssh killdeer.digital help for discovery and ssh [username]@killdeer.digital without a subcommand for the interactive menu.
Destructive delete commands require --confirm and should be presented carefully.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all VMs for the authenticated user, with running VMs shown first.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show detailed information for a VM.

commands.name: restart
commands.description: Restart a VM by stopping and starting it.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new VM. ip-type may be --ipv4, --ipv6, or --dualstack. --ipv4 is the default.

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a VM. The --confirm flag is required.

commands.name: console
commands.description: Attach to the VM serial console. Ctrl+] exits.

commands.name: timer
commands.description: Show, set, adjust, cancel, or force an active shutdown timer. Durations include 30m, 2h, and 1d, with a maximum of 7 days.

commands.name: sizes
commands.description: List available VM sizes and pricing.
